title: Vulnerability Plugin
description:
The ACF Image Crop Add-on is not specifically in use. Here's the evidence:
                                                                                                                                                                                                       
  - No image_crop field type found in acf-fields.php (where all ACF fields for this site are PHP-registered)                                                                                           
  - No image_crop field type stored in the DB (wp_posts where post_type='acf-field')
  - No postmeta containing image_crop keys on any content                                                                                                                                               
  - Only evidence of the plugin: an acf_image_crop_settings WP option with default/minimal values (hide_cropped: false, retina_mode: false) — these are written on activation, not evidence of actual
  use


https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2023-22676

title: New Breadcrumbs structured data issues detected
description:
The client received this email from  Google. I've add the message content verbatim:
 
"Breadcrumbs structured data issues detected in harkerinjurylaw.com
To the owner of harkerinjurylaw.com:
Search Console has identified that your site is affected by 1 Breadcrumbs structured data issue(s). The following issues were found on your site.

Top critical issues*

Missing field "item" (in "itemListElement")
*Critical issues prevent your page or feature from appearing in Search results.
We recommend that you fix these issues when possible to enable the best experience and coverage in Google Search.

Fix Breadcrumbs structured data issues 

 Message type: [WNC-10030322]
You've received this transactional email because your site is listed in Google Search Console. You may unsubscribe from this type of message or add partners who should receive messages for this Search Console account
Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway Mountain View, CA 94043 "

title: GBP & Site Phone Numbers
description:
Currently, the both GBPs use this number - (760) 465-8733

We need to confirm the correct phone numbers to use across this client’s GBP(s), website, and citations so everything follows our Ideal GBP Phone Number Structure.

IDEAL GBP & SITE NUMBER STRUCTURE:
  • GBP Primary: Tracking number (if used - only on GBP)
  • GBP Secondary: Local NAPW number (used also across applicable areas on Website + Citations)
Each location should have one unique number tied to that office across the web for NAPW consistency.


INTERNAL CHECK FIRST:
I already checked the GBP(s) and website, but couldn’t confirm the correct location numbers.

Before contacting the client, please check internally for:
  • Call Rail access (do location-specific numbers exist?)
  • Past client communication
  • Internal notes/tasks
Goal: see if we can determine the correct numbers without asking the client first.

If we cannot determine the correct numbers internally, we will need to reach out to confirm/obtain a unique local number for each location.


NUMBER SET UP OPTIONS:
Preferred 
  • GBP Primary: Tracking number
  • GBP Secondary: Local NAPW number
  • Website + citations use the local number

Also Acceptable
If the client only has one unique number per location, that number can be used everywhere: 
  •  GBP
  •  Website
  •  Citations
The only downside is that GBP calls won’t be attributed separately.
